name: 7-lb bag—Encourage healthy egg production in your girls with Scratch and Peck Feed Cluckin' Good Layer Grit Chicken Supplements. These grit supplements for laying hens are formulated to help the healthy development of gizzards in chickens who are at least 20 weeks old. They contain insoluble crushed quartzite and granite to assist in grinding food and easing digestion. These chicken grit supplements are crafted in a size that’s ideal for laying hens who lack access to small sharp rocks.
